meta.source: Wikipedia: List of cities by sunshine duration
meta.note: Recorded monthly bright-sunshine hours from national meteorological-service climate normals, compiled on Wikipedia. Shown as average sunshine hours per day for each calendar month. Coordinates geocoded via GeoNames / Open-Meteo.
